compiled_state.title: As a plugin developer, tests with behavioral value are rewritten to follow the behavioral testing standard
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: For tests classified as "replace" in the triage, write behavioral alternatives that execute the script/tool under test and assert on observable output, following the shared behavioral testing standard from Epic 8df3-61d0.
**Why**: Some existing tests cover genuinely important behavior but use anti-patterns (grepping source files). These need behavioral replacements before deletion.
**Scope**:
- IN: Write behavioral replacement tests for all "replace"-classified tests from the triage
- IN: Each replacement test executes the code under test and asserts on observable output (exit codes, stdout, stderr, file side effects)
- IN: Delete the original anti-pattern tests after replacements pass
- IN: Update .test-index for replaced test files
- OUT: Tests classified as "delete" (already handled) or "keep" (already behavioral)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, all tests classified as "replace" in the triage have behavioral alternatives that execute code and assert on observable output
  ← Satisfies: "replaced with behavioral alternatives (execute the script/tool and assert on observable output)"
- When this story is complete, the original anti-pattern tests are deleted after replacements pass
  ← Satisfies: "measurable reduction in test files that grep markdown source content"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
  ← Satisfies: TDD done-of-done

## Considerations

- [Testing] Replacement tests must follow the behavioral testing standard from Epic 8df3-61d0

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Consideration: [Correctness] Replacement tests must preserve .test-index source mappings — new tests must map to the same source files as the originals so the test gate continues to protect those source files.
comments.author: Test
